# Ellen Hermance

> Portfolio of Ellen Hermance: Senior Web Producer, Web Developer, and Website Manager with 20 years of experience in CMS governance, WCAG accessibility, and technical SEO. Founder and Product Manager of PlantCareAI, an AI-powered plant care platform. Owner of Elloquist LLC, the parent company of PlantCareAI and the Elloquist media brand.

Ellen Hermance is a web professional based in Austin, Texas. She spent 20
years running enterprise web properties, including managing web production
across 30+ consumer brand sites at World Travel Holdings and leading a CMS
migration spanning 18 of them. She built and operates PlantCareAI end to
end, directing Claude Code as the development engine, and writes about
AI-assisted development.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://ehermance.com/): Who Ellen is, what she does, and recent projects
- [Writing](https://ehermance.com/writing/): Essays on AI-assisted development, solo founding, and accessibility
- [How I Built a Production AI App Solo](https://ehermance.com/writing/how-i-built-plantcareai/): The honest story of building PlantCareAI by directing Claude Code

## Related sites

- [PlantCareAI](https://plantcareai.app): AI-powered plant care platform founded by Ellen; weather-aware reminders, personalized care advice, and a free tier
- [Ellen's PlantCareAI author page](https://plantcareai.app/author/ellen-hermance): Bio and plant care guide methodology
- [Elloquist](https://elloquist.com): Science and culture media brand operated by Elloquist LLC, Ellen's company and the parent of PlantCareAI
